title: Middleware Pipeline

statement.markdown:
## Problem Description
Implement a middleware pipeline in TypeScript that can handle both synchronous and asynchronous functions.

### Requirements
1. The pipeline should be able to handle multiple functions of different types.
2. The pipeline should be able to handle functions that return promises.
3. The pipeline should be able to handle functions that throw errors.
4. The pipeline should be able to handle functions that return multiple values.

constraints: Use classes and objects to implement the pipeline.
Handle both synchronous and asynchronous functions.

gradingCriteria.description: The pipeline can handle synchronous functions
The pipeline can handle asynchronous functions
The pipeline can handle functions that throw errors
The pipeline can handle functions that return multiple values
